title: Slingshot EMA(high,4) Pullback
thesis: Strength pullback closes back over EMA of highs.
entry_logic: Above SMA50, recent close below EMA(high,4), trigger cross back above.
exit_logic: Close below EMA(high,4), ATR trail, or fixed R.

title: Linda 5SMA RS Pullback
thesis: Trend asset pulls below 5SMA and exits on snapback.
entry_logic: Above SMA50/200, close dips below SMA5, next open entry.
exit_logic: Exit when close recovers above SMA5 or ATR stop.

title: Crabel Range Expansion
thesis: Previous range expansion breakout above/below prior close.
entry_logic: High reaches close[1]+range[1]*mult or low reaches close[1]-range[1]*mult.
exit_logic: Same close, next close, ATR/time exits.

title: Daily Extension Anti-Chase Filter
thesis: Block late long/short entries after consecutive extended candles.
required_data: Daily OHLCV plus target strategy trades
entry_logic: Not standalone; blocks entries after 3-5 strong candles.

title: Kell Wedge Pop / EMA Crossback
thesis: Trend continuation after EMA10/20 contraction and reclaim.
required_data: OHLCV with daily and intraday bars
entry_logic: EMA10 above EMA20, recent compression, close reclaims fast EMA.
exit_logic: Close below EMA20 or ATR/time exit.

title: BigBeluga RSI Divergence + CHoCH + ATR
thesis: RSI divergence confirmed by market structure shift with ATR management.
entry_logic: Confirmed divergence plus CHoCH, next bar open.

title: EMA20/50 Two-Retest Baseline
thesis: Generic EMA20/50 cross plus two retests baseline.

title: 8AM ET Opening Range Breakout
exit_logic: Time exit or opposite range side.

title: Weinstein / Long-Base Stage Analysis
thesis: Position-trading trend stage and base breakout framework.
required_data: Long history OHLCV, relative strength preferred
entry_logic: Stage 2 breakout above base and rising MA.

title: Martin Luke Pullback AVWAP
thesis: Pullback into EMA/anchored VWAP confluence with reclaim trigger.
required_data: OHLCV; true AVWAP improves with intraday volume
entry_logic: Flush into support confluence, reclaim previous bar high.
exit_logic: Partial at R targets and EMA trail.

title: HighBeta Opening-Bar Gap-and-Go
thesis: Strong first 5m bar continuation if low holds.
required_data: US high-beta intraday with gaps; crypto proxy available
entry_logic: First bar range extreme, hold low, break high.

title: CANSLIM Shakeout +3
required_data: US equities OHLCV plus RS/fundamental context
entry_logic: Second low undercuts first low; buy point L1+3 or percentage equivalent.

title: Wyckoff / Process Framework
entry_logic: Not mechanical enough from intake alone.

title: Ty Rajnus Microcap Liquidity Reversion Short
thesis: US microcap premarket overextension short with borrow/halt constraints.
required_data: US microcap 1m, premarket, borrow/locate, dilution, halt flags
sl_logic: Wide adverse stop and halt rules.
